# Elluminate

> Elluminate plans physical and virtual team building, company retreats, and corporate workshops around the people, objective, venue, and timing. Elluminate and Team Elevate are operated by EXSTATIC PTE LTD; cumulative event history is shared across the two brands.

## Main pages

- [Home](/): Team building and company experience planning.
- [Team Building](/services/team-building): Corporate physical and virtual team-building overview and enquiry.
- [Retreats](/services/retreats): Local and overseas company retreat options.
- [Training](/services/training): Corporate workshops and facilitated team sessions.
- [About](/about): The Elluminate team and shared EXSTATIC operating history.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Real activity, workshop, and retreat media.
- [Blog](/blog): Team-building and event-planning guides.

## Physical team-building activities

- [Amazing Race](/services/amazing-race): Outdoor race with team checkpoints and missions.
- [Cultural Race](/services/cultural-race): Singapore discovery race with local routes and challenges.
- [CSI-Bones](/services/csi-bones): Indoor forensic mystery challenge.
- [Minute To Win It](/services/minute-to-win-it): Quick-rotation team games.
- [Monopoly Dash](/services/monopoly-dash): Strategy race and facilitated team challenge.
- [Running Man](/services/running-man): Active mission-based team format.
- [Builder Cross](/services/builder-cross): Hands-on team construction challenge.
- [Treasure Heist](/services/treasure-heist): Strategy and puzzle team activity.

## Virtual team-building activities

- [Virtual Amazing Race](/services/amazing-race-virtual)
- [Virtual Gameshow](/services/the-gameshow-experience-virtual)
- [Virtual Escape Room](/services/the-nuclear-fallout-escape-room-virtual)
- [Virtual Treasure Hunt](/services/tomb-raider-king-treasure-hunt-virtual)
